title: Intel
text: Home * Organizations * Intel Intel headquarters, Santa Clara, CA [1] Intel Corporation , an American global technology company and the world's largest semiconductor manufacturer [2] , most famous for their microprocessors , starting in 1971 with the first general-purpose, commercial microprocessor, the 4004 [3] .
